security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Score text by predicted brain response, locally.
bundle.longDescription: Cortext wraps Meta's TRIBE v2 fMRI model in a local macOS app. It sets up its own runtime and models on first launch and runs entirely on your machine. Research / personal use only (model weights are CC BY-NC).
